title: Unity Software Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript - Key Points
text: Financial Performance: Strategic revenue growth: 35% year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA margin: 27%, up 800 basis points YoY. Adjusted EBITDA: $138 million, up 65% YoY. Segment Results: Grow segment: $279 million revenue, 49% YoY growth (80% driven by Vector). Create segment: $154 million revenue, 15% YoY growth. Vector revenue: 80% higher than prior year with four consecutive quarters of 15% sequential growth. Key Metrics: New Unity sign-ups grew 20% quarter-over-quarter, the fastest pace since 2020. Mobile app releases up 60% YoY across iOS and Android. Developer opt-in rates for Unity's data framework exceeded 90%. Strategic Initiatives: Unity AI public beta: Achieved 70% user attachment after five days of launch. Runtime data integration: Transitioning from testing to live production in Q2. Commerce platform: On track for launch in current quarter with partners like SciPlay and Voodoo. M&A exits: Sunsetting ironSource Ad Network and divesting Supersonic publishing. Profitability Milestone: Management forecasts GAAP net income profitability by Q4 2026, driven by margin expansion and declining M&A amortization (dropping from $117M in Q1 to $55M by Q4). Q2 2026 Guidance: Strategic revenue: $455M–$465M (29–32% YoY growth). Adjusted EBITDA: $130M–$135M (44–49% margin expansion YoY).
